headline: Chipmakers head for big profit gains, but will it be enough?
summary: Chipmakers are in focus on Wall Street, with their shares turning mercurial this month and investors banking on a few dozen newly valuable companies to deliver nearly half of S&P 500 profit growth for the second quarter.  The PHLX Semiconductor index has surged this ‌year, reflecting massive gains at firms such as Micron Technology, Advanced Micro and Broadcom, but lately the 30-stock index has become a volatility show.

headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads On Peace Hopes; SpaceX Falls, Bus Maker Breaks Out (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and the other major stock indexes weakened and remained mixed Monday as investors still had hopes for peace between the U.S. and Iran after weekend attacks.  Meanwhile, Micron Technology and Sandisk moved up while SpaceX continued to slide and a school bus name broke out on the stock market today.  The Dow fell 0.2% Monday late morning.
